title: Prospecting Outcomes
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS probes FROM ProspectedAsteroid WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Content, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ProspectedAsteroid WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Content ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {probes} asteroid(s) prospected during the report period. Prospecting is the intelligence-gathering phase of mining — the content distribution reveals what the rings were yielding and whether your ring-type choices were paying off.
details.help: ProspectedAsteroid fires when a prospector limpet returns results. Content indicates the asteroid's primary material category.

tagLines: Prospecting limpet returns archived. Asteroid content distribution noted for operational review.
The probe tells you what's inside before you commit. The results tell you if the rings were lying.
Most rocks are disappointments. The ones that aren't — those are why you keep prospecting.
